title: corybas pruinosus
intro: Corybas pruinosus, also known as the helmet orchid, is a type of terrestrial orchid native to Australia. This plant is known for its unique, helmet-shaped flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for various purposes. The medicinal properties of Corybas pruinosus include its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been used to treat a range of health issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties and promote overall health and well-being.
